questions.question: To the delight of fans everywhere, Lorelai and Rory reunited in 2016 for a four episode revival of this classic mother/daughter saga.
What app sensation, released in 2016, allowed cell phone camera users to capture animated monsters that would "appear" in real life?
This singer came in second on American Idol in 2008 and sang the popular song "Crush."
Name the nationwide demonstration organized by Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School students after the mass shooting at their school.
If people were "twerking," what were they doing?
